items.text: Machine Learning Engineer and Research Associate bridging applied AI research and production-oriented data systems. Experienced in Python, workflow orchestration (Airflow), and MLOps lifecycle practices (versioning, deployment, monitoring). Background in IoT, ROS, and FAIR-aligned experimentation. Proven experience deploying scalable data and ML pipelines across major cloud providers including Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud (Vertex AI, S3, Spark, BigQuery). Fully compliant with MSCA mobility rules with an Anabin/ZAB validated German Master's equivalency.
